channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Gemius, 31 March–7 April 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
5 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Gemius, 31 March–7 April 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/latvian_ep_polls/2026-04-07-Gemius.html
